prompt: Implement `trap(height: number[]): number` that computes how much water can be trapped after raining given an elevation map where `height[i]` is the bar height at index i.
canonicalSolution: export function trap(height: number[]): number { let lo = 0, hi = height.length - 1, lMax = 0, rMax = 0, water = 0; while (lo < hi) { if (height[lo]! <= height[hi]!) { if (height[lo]! >= lMax) lMax = height[lo]!; else water += lMax - height[lo]!; lo++; } else { if (height[hi]! >= rMax) rMax = height[hi]!; else water += rMax - height[hi]!; hi--; } } return water; }
